note: Labelled topic→table set for the WP16 table finder, extended in WP27 stage A (question-aware rerank, ADR 027). Every expected tableId MUST exist in tests/fixtures/cbs/_catalog.json, the hermetic catalog the eval's recall runs over, so record→replay stays consistent. Cases may carry an optional 'question' (the user's full question, threaded into the rerank prompt); the eval harnesses fall back to the topic when it is absent. Several cases have a Regulier answer that ranks BELOW discontinued keyword-matches in raw recall — they test the rerank's 'prefer current tables' rule ON TOP of the WP27 Regulier-first recall quota (amendment A2). Session-25 live calibration: 8/8 on the original set; correct confident picks measured 0.85–0.95 (floor 0.85), threshold 0.8 failure-safe (a below-0.8 pick DISCLOSES, never a wrong table). WP27 additions: bijstand-stock/bijstand-flow are the stock-vs-flow discriminator pair from the live #111 dead-end — the stock case expects 37789ksz ('Sociale zekerheid; kerncijfers', owner decision 2026-07-08: the ONLY v1-deliverable table for a year-explicit national bijstand question; it counts UITKERINGEN, not persons, and the answer names that measure verbatim) and must NOT land on 85615NED (flows). inkomen-vaag is the genuinely-ambiguous disclose-expected case that closes the #104 gap (the confident/disclose boundary is now directly measured). zonnepanelen relabelled 82610NED→85004NED in session 25 (verified from CBS metadata, not model confidence).

cases.question: Hoe hoog is de werkloosheid in Nederland?
cases.note: Got a real question in WP27 stage A: under the v2 vagueness rule a bare topic-word (question == topic) HONESTLY discloses — but production always passes the full question since WP27, so the topic-only shape no longer represents any real path. The other legacy bare-topic cases stay as robustness pins (they still route confidently). RELABELLED session 54 (2026-07-18, 85224NED -> 80590ned): with the monthly table in the catalog, the reranker stably prefers it (fresher, monthly) for a generic 'hoe hoog is nu' question - defensible, and PRODUCTION-MOOT: both tables are now CURATED so the #166 held-table screen catches this route pre-charge, and the canonical default (bare 'werkloosheid' -> the quarterly key) lives in the intent vocabulary, measured intact in the s54 intent evals.
85004NED 'Hernieuwbare energie; zonnestroom…' is the direct solar-output table; 82610NED (general renewable electricity) is the acceptable runner-up.

cases.question: Hoeveel mensen zaten er in 2023 in de bijstand?
cases.note: The live #111 dead-end question. MEASURED (first record, session 31): Haiku reads the stock shape correctly but picks the person-level stock table 85585NED (deliverability is invisible in title/summary — the information gap the stage-C fit gate exists for) with 37789ksz in its alternatives. The system-level requirement is therefore chain semantics, exactly the amended brief's measurement gate: the candidate chain (pick + alternativeIds, Stage-B cap 3) must contain 37789ksz (the only v1-deliverable table — the A3 pre-checks skip the person-tables deterministically and deliver via it), and the pick must NOT be the flow table 85615NED (the original mis-pick class). A tier escalation would not help: no title/summary-only model can see deliverability. REGRESSION HISTORY: the chainContains assertion was weakened session 54 (2026-07-18) after Haiku stably (4/4, byte-identical prompt) dropped 37789ksz from the cap-3 chain (upstream model drift; the fit gate kept the class honest: refuse-and-refund). ✅ RESTORED same day as walkContains (#172 step 0, ADR-027 A4): the fit-gate walk now extends past the model chain into the FULL current remainder of the Stage-1 shortlist (measured: 37789ksz at live position 22/24 — any small cap provably misses it), so the assertion is SYSTEM-level (pick + alternates + current-shortlist extension via candidateWalk), drift-proof against any one model's alt-list whims. notPick stays asserted.

cases.question: Hoeveel mensen stroomden er in 2023 de bijstand in?
cases.note: Flow-phrased twin of bijstand-stock: same topic term, opposite shape — the question, not the topic, must decide.

cases.question: Wat zijn de cijfers over inkomen?
cases.note: Genuinely ambiguous (mean/median, household/person, distribution/regional) — a human would ask back. Closes the #104 gap: the first disclose-expected case, so the confident/disclose boundary is directly measured.
